ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., federal, state, local) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "total_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters */,
  "total_votes_cast" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Voter turnout percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party the candidate belongs to */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the candidate is participating in */,
  "candidate_age" INTEGER /* Age of the candidate */,
  "candidate_experience" TEXT /* Relevant experience of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Full name of the party */,
  "party_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the party name */,
  "party_website" TEXT /* Official website of the party */,
  "party_leader" TEXT /* Current leader of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the group belongs to */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate receiving the vote */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the vote belongs to */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the vote belongs to */,
  "num_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast */,
  "vote_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the vote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_methods" (
  "voting_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting method */,
  "voting_method_name" TEXT /* Full name of the voting method */,
  "voting_method_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the voting method */,
  "voting_method_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the voting method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voting_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electoral_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electoral district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the electoral district */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the district belongs to */,
  "district_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the district */,
  "district_population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electoral_districts_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_booths" (
  "booth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting booth */,
  "booth_name" TEXT /* Name of the voting booth */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the electoral district the booth belongs to */,
  "booth_address" TEXT /* Address of the voting booth */,
  "booth_capacity" INTEGER /* Voting capacity of the booth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_booths_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES electoral_districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, election official, candidate) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_groups" (
  "candidate_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate-group association */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "group_order" INTEGER /* Order of the group for the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_groups_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_groups_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_groups" (
  "party_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party-group association */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "group_order" INTEGER /* Order of the group for the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_groups_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_groups_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "num_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total votes */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., 'declared', 'undecided') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_method_results" (
  "voting_method_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting method result */,
  "voting_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voting method */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "num_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total votes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voting_method_result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electoral_district_results" (
  "district_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electoral district result */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the electoral district */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "num_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total votes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_booth_results" (
  "booth_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting booth result */,
  "booth_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voting booth */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "num_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total votes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booth_result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
